search_queries: 2026 IRA contribution limit catch-up IRS Notice 2025-67
IRS COLA increases retirement plan dollar limitations 2026
contract_notes: Report 15 dollar amounts for calendar year 2026. All values are annual dollar limits.
elective_deferral_401k applies to 401(k), 403(b), and governmental 457 plans.
catch_up_401k_50_plus is the standard age-50+ catch-up for 401(k)/403(b)/457. catch_up_401k_60_to_63 is the higher SECURE 2.0 catch-up for ages 60-63.
ira_contribution_limit is the combined limit for traditional and Roth IRAs. ira_catch_up_50_plus is the additional amount for age 50+.
simple_elective_deferral is the standard SIMPLE IRA/401(k) limit. simple_catch_up amounts follow the same age pattern.
sep_maximum_contribution is the maximum employer contribution under IRC §415(c). sep_minimum_compensation is the threshold for participation.
annual_additions_limit_415c is the IRC §415(c) limit on total annual additions to defined contribution plans.
Source is IRS Notice 2025-67 and/or the IRS COLA increases page.
